//: Plugin MCP servers. ${VAR} values expand from the environment (export locally or use bin/pm-local.*, which sources .env; Actions secrets in CI). GITHUB_MCP_TOKEN: a GitHub PAT with issues read/write — the hosted GitHub MCP does NOT accept the Actions-issued GITHUB_TOKEN. SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN: a management PAT (sbp_...). Domain servers for consultants (e.g. an editor MCP) are added here by /tailor.
